originalTitle: Review & Preview: Revenge of the Selloff
summary: Traders sold the chip rebound on Tuesday. Plus, DraftKings’ prediction market business gains ground.

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
